page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.4xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing the Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, the instance provides predictable compute performance without the resource-sharing overhead of hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per physical core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps, facilitating steady data transfer rates for network-dependent operations.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation combined with a high memory density makes this instance suitable for workloads requiring consistent processing power and large memory footprints without the cost of a GPU. The lack of local storage requires architectural planning for storage-heavy applications. This profile is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads such as medium-sized databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise applications, and data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.4xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Operating under the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage options, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation and single thread per core configuration, the ecs.r9i.4xlarge offers predictable compute performance. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, including database hosting, in-memory caching, and enterprise application deployments that require substantial memory capacity and stable processing power without GPU acceleration.
